title: Cartographic Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalEarnings), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(Bonus), 0) AS bonus FROM MultiSellExplorationData WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} cartographic data submission(s) to Universal Cartographics totalling {total} Cr during the report period, including {bonus} Cr in first-discovery bonuses — premium payouts awarded when you are the first commander ever to chart a given star system or body.
details.help: MultiSellExplorationData fires when selling exploration data at Universal Cartographics. TotalEarnings includes both base value and bonus.

tagLines: Universal Cartographics acknowledges receipt of your survey data. Processing fees withheld as applicable.
The mapping agencies didn't know those systems existed. They do now. You're welcome.
Every credit here is a star system that humanity now knows exists.
